chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Generosity and Munificence

text: 1708 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «شَابٌّ سَخِيٌّ مُرَهَّقٌ فِي اَلذُّنُوبِ أَحَبُّ إِلَى اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مِنْ شَيْخٍ عَابِدٍ بَخِيلٍ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1708 - Imam (as) said: "A young person who is generous but overwhelmed by sins is more beloved to Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, than an old worshiper who is stingy."
